src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Replace deprecated Liquibase API method setLabels with setLabelFilter to maintain compatibility with newer Liquibase versions.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a standalone @Configuration class returning a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to support Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.0+ method security.
Replace deprecated authorizeRequests().antMatchers() with authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() for lambda-based configuration.
Replace deprecated headers() DSL with lambda-based headers() configuration for CSP, frame options, and referrer policy.
Replace deprecated featurePolicy() with permissionsPolicy() as the former is removed in newer Spring Security versions.
Replace deprecated exceptionHandling() DSL with lambda-based exceptionHandling() configuration.
Replace deprecated sessionManagement() DSL with lambda-based sessionManagement() configuration.
Replace deprecated csrf() DSL with lambda-based csrf() configuration.
Add oauth2ResourceServer configuration to handle JWT authentication, replacing custom JWTConfigurer.
Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handlers with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
Replace manual CorsFilter injection with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
